commands.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTEST_ADDOPTS='-p no:cacheprovider' uv run --with pytest --python 3.11 pytest -q
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --python 3.11 meta-flow install --platform codex --scope project --component agent --project-dir . --dry-run
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --python 3.11 meta-flow cp result-check --result process/checks/CP6-MF-018-QUALITY-GOVERNANCE-CODING-DONE.result.json --project-root .
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --python 3.11 meta-flow story evidence-check --index process/evidence/MF-018.CP6.index.json --project-root .
